styleGuide.visualDirection: Cute snake-burrow mobile UI, hybrid style: clean playful homepage + structured functional panel system.
mustHave: clear center text safe zone for buttons
styleGuide.languageSupportHint: Leave enough flat area for both short Chinese labels and medium-length English labels.

assets.prompt: Create a single plain background scene plate for a cute snake-burrow puzzle game at 430x932 portrait ratio. Keep top and center regions visually calm for overlays, with soft grass and soil depth only.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no letters, no logos, no UI elements, no buttons, no icons, no labels, no watermark, no photorealism, no high-frequency noise, no dark horror mood, no foreground characters
assets.safeAreaHint: Reserve clean top 22% and middle 30% for UI overlays.
assets.readabilityHint: Background contrast should not overpower white or dark title text.

assets.prompt: Create one solid filled popup panel background only (not a hollow frame), rounded corners, cute snake-burrow style, subtle wood-and-cream texture, calm center for text blocks.
assets.negativePrompt: no holes, no cutout window, no hollow frame, no embossed text, no heavy grain, no metallic industrial style
assets.safeAreaHint: Inner 80% area should be low-noise and readable.
assets.readabilityHint: Panel center must support body text and list rows.

assets.prompt: Create one isolated blank primary button skin only: wide rounded shape, warm cheerful tone, strong center highlight, clean border, transparent background.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no letters, no mascot, no character, no extra objects, no tiny ornaments near center, no harsh gradients, no over-detailed pattern
assets.safeAreaHint: Keep center 60% flat and clean for localization text.
assets.readabilityHint: Designed for high contrast dark label text.

assets.prompt: Create one isolated blank feature card background only: solid filled compact rounded card, clear top icon zone and bottom label zone, transparent outside the card only, consistent with primary button style.
assets.negativePrompt: no holes, no cutout circles, no cutout bars, no text, no letters, no icon, no mascot, no random decals, no noisy center texture, no extra floating objects
assets.safeAreaHint: Leave top 45% for icon and bottom 35% for label.
assets.readabilityHint: Card should remain legible at ~118x102 rendered size.

assets.prompt: Create a cute home icon for snake-burrow game UI, bold silhouette and simple shading, high recognition at small size.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no watermark, no thin fragile lines
assets.safeAreaHint: Icon must fit comfortably inside a circular button.

assets.prompt: Create a cute gear settings icon with clear silhouette and warm cartoon shading, matching snake-burrow visual style.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no tiny details that disappear when scaled
assets.readabilityHint: Must remain clear in feature card icon area.

assets.prompt: Create a trophy or ranking badge icon in cute cartoon style, bold and friendly, for snake puzzle game menu.
assets.negativePrompt: no text ribbon, no realistic metal texture
assets.readabilityHint: Distinguishable from settings and check-in at glance.

assets.prompt: Create a skins/customization icon (palette, swatch, or costume marker) in playful snake-burrow style.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no cluttered multi-object composition
assets.readabilityHint: Clear category meaning at small size.

assets.prompt: Create a daily check-in icon using calendar + reward cue in cute mobile game style.
assets.negativePrompt: no text digits, no dense background pattern
assets.safeAreaHint: Leave edge padding for circular masking.
assets.readabilityHint: Should support red numeric badge without visual collision.

assets.prompt: Create a simple exit icon (door or outbound arrow) in friendly cartoon style for game menu use.
assets.negativePrompt: no danger symbols, no harsh warning styling
assets.safeAreaHint: Single icon, no extra decorative side objects.
assets.readabilityHint: Distinct from home icon and settings icon.

assets.prompt: Create a coin icon with warm gold tone and clean outline, matching cute snake puzzle theme.
assets.negativePrompt: no embossed words, no realistic glare

assets.prompt: Create an energy icon (leaf, drop, or spark) in soft cartoon style consistent with coin icon family.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no electric realistic effects
assets.safeAreaHint: Center-aligned icon with clear outer contour.
